title: poarium verticillatum
intro: Poarium verticillatum, also known as Whorled Milfoil, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Poarium verticillatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and soothing menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Poarium verticillatum typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use.
